value.found_quote: With subagent workflows, you can also define your own custom agents with different model configurations and instructions depending on the task.
value.rationale: The page describes Codex subagent workflows with specialized roles (built-in agents like explorer/worker, and custom agents with distinct jobs) and tool surfaces (e.g., dedicated MCP servers per agent). It states "Current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default," indicating active availability.
